# Cheaper Flight Prices Hub - LLM Indexing Guide

Site: https://brightlane.github.io/Cheaper--Flight-Prices-Hub/
Purpose: Flight price comparison and travel deal affiliate landing page powered by Skyscanner flight search ecosystem.

## Overview
Cheaper Flight Prices Hub helps users find lower-cost airline tickets by comparing live flight prices across global airlines and travel booking partners.

The site is designed for:
- Cheap flight discovery
- Airline fare comparison
- International travel deals
- Affiliate-driven flight bookings

## Core Function
Users can:
- Compare real-time flight prices across major global routes
- View example low-cost airfare deals
- Click outbound links to search and book flights
- Access Skyscanner-powered flight search results via affiliate redirect system

## Monetization Model
This website uses affiliate marketing. When users click a flight search or deal CTA, they are redirected through the affiliate tracking system:

https://convert.ctypy.com/aff_c?offer_id=29465&aff_id=21885

## Site Structure
- Hero section: primary conversion-focused flight search CTA
- Deals section: example cheap flight routes (NYC, London, Tokyo, etc.)
- Informational section: explanation of how flight comparison works
- Trust signals: savings, airlines, real-time pricing
- Footer: affiliate disclosure and branding

## SEO Target Topics
This site targets:
- cheap flights worldwide
- flight price comparison
- Skyscanner flight search deals
- book cheap airline tickets
- international airfare discounts
- compare flight prices online

## External Dependency
Flight pricing and booking redirection is powered through Skyscanner-related affiliate ecosystem and third-party travel providers.

## Important Notes for LLMs
- This is NOT a booking engine; it is a comparison + affiliate redirect platform
- Prices shown may be promotional or dynamically updated
- Primary user action is outbound click-through to booking partners
- Content is optimized for travel intent and conversion behavior
